FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.35sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f7272da3060>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'user_list': [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}], 'test_username': 'testuser'}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1005: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/07/21 00:17:20.467205620 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/07/21 00:17:20.467320964 if (!missing(encoding))

2026/07/21 00:17:20.467386172 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/07/21 00:17:20.467471610 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/21 00:17:20.467483117 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)

2026/07/21 00:17:20.467535366 "default"))

2026/07/21 00:17:21.538583316 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538607693 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/07/21 00:17:21.538623306 {

2026/07/21 00:17:21.538635184 if (!missing(width))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538644749 new$width <- width
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538645269 if (!missing(height))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538655224 new$height <- height

2026/07/21 00:17:21.538693392 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538703807 new$version <- version
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538704318 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538714333 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538714954 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538725310 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538725850 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538741865 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538742475 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538752490 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538753081 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538763177 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538764939 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538776136 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538776517 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538790317 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538791930 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538803447 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538803998 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538814704 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538815425 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538826862 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538828184 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538839261 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538839802 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538863908 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538864549 if (!missing(producer))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538875075 new$producer <- producer
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538875716 if (!missing(author))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538885941 new$author <- author
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538886562 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538899191 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538899772 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/07/21 00:17:21.538913222 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538921915 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538933843 "default"))
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538934464 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538944569 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538945110 }
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538955235 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538955786 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538966051 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/21 00:17:21.538973032 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/07/21 00:17:21.538985060 }

2026/07/21 00:17:21.538995536 }

2026/07/21 00:17:21.539021134 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/21 00:17:21.539021715 domain = NA)
2026/07/21 00:17:21.539033182 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/21 00:17:21.539033703 }

2026/07/21 00:17:21.539049046 old$family <- family
2026/07/21 00:17:21.539049617 }

2026/07/21 00:17:21.539096517 if (!checkIntFormat(file))

2026/07/21 00:17:21.539148355 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
